title: lacellia prutenica
side_effects: Lacellia prutenica can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and abdominal pain, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant can also lead to liver damage and kidney failure. Some users may experience allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and respiratory problems, particularly if they have a history of allergies or sensitivities. Furthermore, Lacellia prutenica can interact with certain medications, including blood thinners and diabetes medications, which may cause adverse reactions and complications.
